TESTO_RECENSIONE: Aromatisch, heel veel op het fruit, peche.

Suuuuper Prosecco die totaal niet naar prosecco smaakt. Vanille, fris, helemaal top!
Winnaartje op de agri. Topfles van het huis waar we nu alle wijnen van geproefd hebben. Tropisch, beetje frambozensnoepje. Heerlijke afdronk. Genieten.
Prijzige (€29,95) Prosecco, maar elke cent waard. Lastig uit te leggen waarom hij veel beter is dan de meeste. Ik denk dan toch aan beduidend meer verfijning, subtiliteit.
Heerlijk bloemig. Lekker bij kersen. Wordt steeds lekkerder

Zeer lichtgeel, groene schijn, in neus aromatisch, appel, muskaat, bloemen, mineralen, peer, kruisbes, litchi, in mond mooie zuren, goede fruitmolligheid, bittertje in de afdronk, middellang, delicate wijn.

Bright pale straw eye with lovely white flowers, pear and apple nose. Initial tongue had slight toast, smooth creamy mouthfeel, citrus notes, lime, zesty green apple and even some grapefruit. Very well balanced, mid acidity, mid (-) dryness and a lovely smooth finish. One of the best Prosecco Superiore as always.
creamy apple and peach lot of flowers off dry high intensity m+ finish m+ body high acidity 11 g/l of sugar...
High elevation prosecco superiore. Cartizze is finally realizing ts potential, this bubbly is a thing of beauty!
Light, fresh, good balance… citrus. I loved it.
Cartizze by the book

Easily a contender of blanc des blancs from any French producer. Minuscule hill in Veneto, it was a lovely visit to their cellar built out of WWI tunnels.  White flowers (jasmine), crushed stones, a faint lychee on the nose. No oaking thank God. White peaches, elegant minerality, banana, melon, young apricots, very light citrusy acidity, subtle bitterness, definitely dry but with a sweet note. Yes a bit of brioche.  Would choose this dude any day against non-pinot noir-dominant champagne

Hill Farmers Blues (Mark Knopfler) One of the best Prosecco’s I ever had! It’s got the pedigree: it’s a single vineyard, multi-award winning sparkling. But I didn’t know that when I tasted it: it’s rich on the nose, fruity and sweet, with some lemon jumping out of the acidity. Very good, Cartizze (now a synonym for Dry but it’s also the name of a hill that is in fact a 1.000-foot-high vineyard of 107 hectares of vines, owned by 140 growers, yes I did my homework).

De cor palha medio, aromas de pera e maçã amarela, algum melão fresco, massa de torta, limão e pedra calcaria. Acidez alta, mineralidade m/a, corpo medio perlage persistente, final m/p deixa discreto floral. Complexo, boa estrutura, delicioso!

Al di là dello sfondo per cui ringrazio mia moglie che oggi si è superata in termini di sapore, qualità e guarnizione... Ti spunta questa bella bottiglia che ho ricevuto in regalo qualche annetto fa: delicato e dal perlage finissimo... Ottimo da riprovare!
BB & B Grand Tasting Aromas of citrus and stone fruit. Smooth with nice acidity. Hint of sweetness. Lean and fresh. Decent finish.

Top quality sparkling wine ( Prosecco ) from Italy I would say dominate pear apple peach green apple lemon Aromas of wild flowers and citrus fruits are followed by flavors of apple, minerals white peachapricot, lemon, lime, nectarine and white peach, as well as interesting mineral notes. expect additional brioche and buttery flavors.

Extremely light color and subtle palate at first. Hints of pear and white currant. Some herbs and flavours are developing in time. Finish is very refreshing and crispy. Probably the best Prosecco tasted so far.

Great and opulent nose of stone fruit, peach and pear, pretty well balanced and elegant.  Perfect balance on the palate. The fruit is opulent but not overwhelming, the length lasts, the finish with a touch of salt is good too.

Very pale lemon color with floral and peachy aromas. It’s a creamy, delicate and pleasant prosecco that feel like off-dry, nice structure. The finish could be longer and seems to have a bit too much sugar, but still very good.

[WSET D4 Sparkling Blind tasting class(3)] A delicate and refresh Glera 100% Cartizze Sparkling. Cartizze is the most prestigious vineyard area within the Conegliano Valdobbiadene Prosecco Superiore DOCG zone in Veneto, Italy. Pale lemon color. M+ intense nose.  Notes of lemon, ripe apple, pear, white peach, melon, hawthorn, thyme, almond.  Off-dry, M+ acidity, M alcohol(11.5%), M+ body, M+ flavor intensity, M+ finish, M+ complexity. Not suitable for bottle ageing.

@4️⃣days to go ! Wset level4 D4 tasting practice. Pale lemon color, mid intensity of nose with apple, green apple, pear, peach, white peach, dried apple, lemon, blossom, acasia, slight cream, wet stone. Brut, off dry, 12g/L residual sugar, mid body, mid+ acidity 5.5g/L acidity, mid  11.5% alc. Mid falvour intensity. Great balance of fruitiness and level of sugar supported by mid+ acidity. Glera 100%. Without exam, I probably never have a chance to try Cartizze. Interesting findings 😄

#BeWine Цвет лимонный. Аромат средней- интенсивности, нежный: много белых цветов и яблочный сок. Брют. Кислотность средняя+. Спиртуозность низкая. Лёгкое. Послевкусие средней+ интенсивности и продолжительности. Доминирует живчик. Не проникся. Оверпрайс.

Prosecco de uma das melhores regiões de Valdobbiadene. Solos com videiras antigas e de calcário. Amarelo palha. Perlage fina e persistente. Olfato médio+ de peras e maçãs doces, abacaxis e toque floral de acácia. No palato é seco, tem boa intensidade, acidez elevada, corpo médio, concentração média de sabores, e final com média persistência.  JS 91 pts. Degustado no Master Class do evento Gambero Rosso, Hotel Unique, São Paulo.

Вот и попробовал Картицце. Груша, цитрусы, цветочные ноты. Сахара многовато (около 30 г/л), но при этом во вкусе показалось интереснее обычных просекко (а может сработала магия этикетки) - с желтыми фруктами и минеральностью. В России нет, в Европе около 25е. 3,8 Tre Bicchieri Spb 2021

Картицце - не такой уж и маленький этот холм, аж на 106га виноградников. Аромат в дюшес и лимоны, даже в лимонное джелато. Отточенный баланс во вкусе, универсально по гастрономии, тонкий перляж, достоточно нежный (неоднократные 3GR все же) вкус, много мела, минеральщины, белых фруктов. Для просекко - очень хорошо. И, по ходу, они сами это понимают и дистанцируются от этого слова на этикетке) 3,65.
